name: search-mcp
description: Web search across multiple providers (Tavily, Brave, Exa, Perplexity) behind one cartridge.

auth.credential_source: per-provider env var (TAVILY_API_KEY / BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY / EXA_API_KEY / PERPLEXITY_API_KEY); see operation 'authenticate'.

tools.name: search_authenticate
tools.description: Store an API key for a search provider. Required before first use of that provider.

api_key.description: API key from the provider's dashboard.

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Run a web search query through the chosen provider. Read-only.

provider.description: Which provider to query. Each has different strengths: tavily = LLM-optimised summaries; brave = privacy-first index; exa = neural search over high-quality content; perplexity = Q&A-style answers with citations.

freshness.description: Recency filter (provider-best-effort; not all providers honour all values).

tools.name: search_answer
tools.description: Get a single answer with citations for a question. Best for Q&A workflows. Read-only.

provider.description: Only providers that support answer-mode (perplexity, tavily).

model.description: Provider-specific model identifier. Optional; defaults to provider's standard model.

tools.name: search_extract
tools.description: Extract structured content from one or more URLs (provider-side scraping + cleanup). Read-only.

provider.description: Only providers that support extraction (tavily, exa).
